title: Dutch Toast with Creamy Indulgence
description: A rich and indulgent twist on the classic Dutch treat, topped with a dollop of creamy goodness.

ingredients.name: Cream
ingredients.notes: Heavy cream or whipping cream work well

instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Butter the bread slices and place them in the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until golden brown, then flip and cook for another 2 minutes.
In a separate bowl, mix together the heavy cream, sugar, cinnamon, and vanilla extract.
Once the toast is done, top each slice with a dollop of the creamy mixture.
